faq.title: FAQs
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our AI text to video generation service.

items.question: What is an AI text to video generator?
items.answer: An AI text to video generator is a powerful tool that uses artificial intelligence to create video content from simple text descriptions. It analyzes your text prompt and generates dynamic, high-quality videos that bring your words to life.

items.question: What is the best text to video AI generator?
items.answer: Veo3 AI offers one of the most advanced text to video generators with exceptional output quality, realistic motion, and sophisticated scene understanding. Our AI models are trained on diverse datasets to create cinematic, professional-grade videos.

items.question: How does text to video AI generation work?
items.answer: Our text to video AI analyzes your written description, understands the context, objects, actions, and styles mentioned, then generates corresponding visual sequences with appropriate motion, lighting, and effects to match your prompt.

items.question: What types of videos can I create with text to video?
items.answer: You can create a wide variety of content including promotional videos, social media content, educational materials, concept visualizations, storytelling videos, and artistic creations. The possibilities are limited only by your imagination.

items.question: Is Veo3 AI's text to video generator free?
items.answer: Veo3 AI offers both free and premium options. New users receive free credits to explore the service. For regular use, we provide affordable subscription plans with more credits and advanced features like higher resolutions and longer video durations.

cta.title: Create Stunning Videos with Only Text Now!
cta.description: Transform your ideas into stunning AI-generated videos with just a simple text prompt. Start creating professional videos in seconds.

aiModelsHero.title: All-in-One AI Text to Video Generator
aiModelsHero.description: Veo3 AI is the ultimate, all-in-one AI text to video generator. We offer access to industry-leading video models including Sora 2, Veo3, and Seedance, all in one single place. Try them seamlessly and create stunning visuals without juggling multiple platforms!

aiVideoShowcase.title: Visualize Any Text with Our AI Video Generator
aiVideoShowcase.description: Bring any text to life with our AI video generator! Create engaging videos of any style with just a simple text prompt. Describe your ideas with a few words, and our video AI can visualize it creatively.

examples.prompt: Under the quiet moonlit forest, moonlight filtered through the intertwined branches like sheer gauze, casting fragmented patches of light across the clearing. A human girl in a worn dress stood barefoot at the clearing's center, gazing up at the moon with eyes brimming with anticipation yet tinged with unease. The brightest beam of moonlight enveloped her precisely. Her body began to emit a soft white glow, her outline blurring. Her hair moved without wind, its ends growing transparent as if woven from light. Starting from her fingertips and toes. She possessed moon-white hair, pointed ears that twitched slightly, and eyes the amber hue of cat's eye stones. She wore a flowing gown adorned with fireflies, her body hovering slightly as her toes lightly touched the ground. She slowly turned to face the camera, a mysterious and gentle smile curving her lips. Finally, she dissolved into a swarm of dancing light butterflies, merging into the moonlit sky and vanishing from sight.

examples.alt: Anime rose blooming with dancing petals
examples.prompt: An anime-style rose blooms before a rope bridge, with petals dancing in the air.

examples.alt: Withered flower reviving beneath crimson clouds
examples.prompt: A withered flower lies on the ground, faintly glowing beneath the crimson and scarlet clouds, exuding an aura of decay, longing, and fragile life. In time-lapse photography, the clouds drift and the flower gradually comes back to life.

examples.alt: First-person plunge through a cosmic starfall
examples.prompt: First-person perspective, plummeting at high speed through a cosmic waterfall of stars, then lightning-fast reaching out to touch a planet, triggering an explosive white light. The camera plunges vertically at extreme speed, accompanied by intense jolts from the energy impact. Focus remains elusive as it rapidly shifts between the hand and the target planet, mostly blurred by motion. All stars stretch into sharp streaks of speed, and the moment of contact erupts with violent, fireworks-like particle effects and lens flares.
